item.title: Haven't seen this in awhile.
item.description: Heroes deserve to be celebrated. Known. Honored. Gonna post it every year. You know the drill, upvote this pic, downvote something else of mine.

item.dc:creator: kdizzle220

item.title: Death of a Ukrainian poet
item.description:
Ukrainian poet and soldier, Maksym Kryvtsov, pictured here with his cat (about whom he wrote a poem), has been killed in action. His cat died too.
Here he is posing with his new poetry book called "Poems from the loophole". It was recognised by PEN Ukraine, an NGO protecting freedom of speech and authors' rights, as one of the best Ukrainian books of 2023. Rest in peace.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: What a difference this must make!! Adorable!
item.description: Edit ( because, quite rightly, people had questions) on investigation, the book is Portrait of Clare (1927) by Francis Brett Young, and it's the library in Suffolk UK... But in case any clarification is needed, I'm not the original op, I just saw it on another site and thought it was great and worth sharing!

item.title: Memes or Memories Vol. 23
item.description:
Hello all, hope your day is well
I should post more
I'm not actually making a dent in my meme catalogue
So this just some of my recent crop
Thank you to all the people I stole from
Anyway, here we go
This is my head canon Shardplate.
Have a good one :)

item.title: Eatin healthy
item.description: Like it's easy and fast to throw together a salad, tastes good, is nutritionally good for me. Hell, I enjoy gardening and I didn't make salads with what I grew!

item.title: Images of Note: smooth brain sunday
item.description:
*hiss*
I feel better too.
HELL YEAH
me tomorrow ngl
There is an Ubuntu Manga. That is all. https://mangakakalot.com/chapter/ep919152/chapter_1
Love niche communities where you are like "hell yeah that is baller". It's how I started using Obsidian.
Give Koalrio your liver.
A system that makes you feel guilty about not producing value due to the limits of your body is not a good system.
D:
Fun fact, that was one of the team leaders who was feeling so overwhelmed during the production due to short deadlines that they just added this as an easter egg.
EGG
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's the unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
pretty sure that won't stop anyone.. greetings online friends
seems appropriate
mmm hmm
might want to put a little tape on it before the flight
i hope you are taking notes, this is how it's done
very cool markings
how is it growing w/out food? so many other questions
who the heck cares what's in the tablets, it gives you fire breath
happy MIM to all those who partake
hopefully the mods scroll by this one
big turnout
probably bc they didnt have reeses pieces back when we found olives?
it's in there somewhere
this dump does not have any hinges
wait what
no
the end
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: My very first ever cross-stitch. Feeling pretty proud.
item.dc:creator: jessmoviedrome

item.title: Maybe I'm alone in this one, but I doubt that I am
item.description: There are several actors that I don't like but accept that they are good at what they do, even just moderately. There are those who carve out a niche for themselves and I can respect that. Seth Rogen isn't one of them. He only ever plays himself, he seems to have little to no emotional range and by my existence as a fan of comedy and animated movies, he has been inflicted upon me. He appears in, seemingly, everything; Invincible, The Super Mario Bros, Kung Fu Panda, as well as numerous live-action movies. In all of them, he plays himself. He can't do accents/different voices, he relies on his odd laugh (which is even the point of a joke in This is the End). Somehow, he consistently gets work. I mostly made this to break away from the political posts. Let's be honest, each day that puts us closer to November, this site is going to get more and more political as we each grow in fear of what will happen if we don't all vote. So, why not vent about someone whose career I cannot fathom?
item.dc:creator: LincLoud

item.title: IM SO EXCITED
item.description: Recently I've been getting a lot of hate from an old 'friend' for being lesbian (we hadn't had contact for a few years, I don't even know how they got my number) but the news somehow got to them and they started blowing up my phone with the stereotypical "how would your parents think", "this is not what god intended" and "I can't believe you would do this to your friends and family, me included" sort of shiz but this has massively brightened up my life:). (I tried to post this earlier but it wouldn't show up so I did it again)
item.dc:creator: QueenNova
